title: UCI to Face Legal Action over Disqualification of Wiebes over 0.02kg Weight Violation
content:
Team of Lorena Wiebes suggests UCI scales was not calibrated correctly: ‘We cannot just let this go’.

Read the full article at UCI to Face Legal Action over Disqualification of Wiebes over 0.02kg Weight Violation on Velo.
author: sstokes
